commit_scope: Add an executable BMF/BML compiler and compiler-compiler picture with a sibling-kernel proof and circulation edges.

local_validation.notes: The new compiler-picture band returns 112251 across Go/Rust/TypeScript, proving ten stages, eight language ports, all ports on the shared carrier/runtime, and two currently proven ports. Existing BMF and BML compiler runtime bands remain green.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The BMF/BML compiler-compiler north-star is now both readable documentation and executable Form model data. Language-port reuse for BMF, BML, Python, TypeScript, Go, Rust, Java, and C# is explicit without changing the core compiler flow.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/tests/bmf-bml-compiler-picture-band.fk

phase_gate.reason: This lands the picture and first executable model. Full BMF source body semantic lowering, BML object-model lowering, runtime grammar capsule registration, and additional Java/C# ports remain open.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/compiler.fk now carries compiler-stage, compiler-flow, compiler-language-port, compiler-picture, and bmf-bml-compiler-picture model cells.
form/form-stdlib/tests/bmf-bml-compiler-picture-band.fk proves the picture invariants across sibling kernels.
kernels/BMF_BML_COMPILER_PICTURE.md shows the compiler/compiler-compiler model, flow, and reusable language-port contract with links back to the legacy archive and kernel docs.
